generated_with: Image2 via Codex built-in image generation
style: bright cute hand-painted mobile cat tower defense, rounded readable shapes, warm playful colors

backgrounds.prompt_summary: Cute hand-painted meadow tower-defense map with winding path, paw-print details, fish-shaped stones, and visible build clearings.
Sunny cheese-themed forest clearing with winding path, cheese rocks, mushrooms, fences, flowers, and paw build clearings.
Moonlit grain storage yard with lanterns, hay bales, sacks, moonflowers, and readable tower-defense route.
Creekside battlefield with blue stream, wooden bridges, stones, reeds, flowers, path, and bridge chokepoints.
Final pantry garden fortress with fish tins, cat food cans, storage props, winding path, and strong final-stage readability.
